Mapping Between Uniface and XML Streams

Mapping Between Uniface and XML Streams

Uniface field and entity names can be mapped to elements in XML streams. This enables Uniface to transport values between XML streams and component fields. Default mappings can be defined for the application model and local mappings can be made for component data.

Uniface maps field values to XML elements in the stream using a combination of the following mapping methods:

  • Local mapping, contained in a DTD mapping list (highest priority). This is a mapping structure defined in ProcScript, as an associative list of element names and Uniface field and entity names.
  • Default mapping (defined in the application model for each DTD). The default mapping is only used if the /incldefmap switch is used.
  • Element and field/entity name matching (lowest priority). For example, Uniface maps data from fields to elements with the same name.

These mapping techniques work in parallel. Local mapping overrides all other mappings for a given element or field. Name matching is applied only to those elements for which no other mapping is defined.

For example, Uniface requires a mapping structure to transport values between an XML element named personName and a field named NME.PERSON.

You can define a default mapping in your application model using the DTD Editor. The default mapping is applied to an XML stream by xmlload if the /incldefmap switch is specified.

You can also create mappings locally in ProcScript, as associative lists. The local mapping is applied if a mapping list is included as an argument for xmlload.

If both the local and default mappings are specified, the local mapping is combined with the default mapping. If the default and local mappings conflict, then the local mapping takes precedence. If a mapping scheme addresses fields that are not available on a component, or elements that are not in the XML stream, then that part of the mapping is ignored.

Related Links
  • Defining DTD Mappings

    Define DTD mapping lists when you need to pass information via XML streams. You can define default mappings for modeled objects and local mappings for specific components or operations.

  • xmlsave

    Places component data in an XML stream.

  • xmlload

    Load data from an XML stream into occurrences drawn on the component.
